translations.text: Be mindful of God who created you and former generations,’
but they replied, ‘You are bewitched!

text_qpc_hafs: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡكَٰذِبِينَ ١٨٦
text_uthmani: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ

translations.text: You are nothing but a man like us. In fact we think you are a liar.

text_qpc_hafs: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسَفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ ١٨٧
text_uthmani: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ

translations.text: Make bits of the heavens fall down on us, if you are telling the truth.’
He said, ‘My Lord knows best what you do.’

text_qpc_hafs: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٍ ١٨٩
text_uthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ

translations.text: They called him a liar, and so the torment of the Day of Shadow came upon them- it was the torment of a terrible day.

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ ١٩٠
text_uthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

translations.text: There truly is a sign in this, though most of them will not believe:
your Lord alone is the Almighty, the Merciful.
Truly, this Quran has been sent down by the Lord of the Worlds:
the Trustworthy Spirit brought it down
to your heart [Prophet], so that you could bring warning
in a clear Arabic tongue.
This was foretold in the scriptures of earlier religions.

text_qpc_hafs: أَوَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ ءَايَةً أَن يَعۡلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَٰٓؤُاْ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ ١٩٧
text_uthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُا۟ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ

translations.text: Is it not proof enough for them that the learned men of the Children of Israel have recognized it?
If We had sent it down to someone who was not an Arab,

text_qpc_hafs: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيۡهِم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ مُؤۡمِنِينَ ١٩٩
text_uthmani: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ

translations.text: and he had recited it to them, they still would not have believed in it.
So We make it pass straight through the hearts of the guilty:

text_qpc_hafs: لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ ٢٠١
text_uthmani: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ

translations.text: they will not believe in it until they see the grievous torment,

translation.text: And it will come to them

translations.text: which will suddenly hit them when they are not expecting it,
and then they will say, ‘Can we have more time?’

translation.text: So is it for Our punishment

translations.text: How can they ask that Our punishment be brought to them sooner?
Think, if we let them enjoy this life for some years
and then the promised torment came upon them,
